# HolaThrift

HolaThrift is a single page thrift storefront for curated rare vintage and streetwear drops in India.

## Canonical Site

https://holathrift.in

## What Users Can Do

- Browse product archives.
- Search and filter by category and size.
- Open product details.
- Add available items to a bag.
- Save favorite items to an account wishlist.
- Save a default delivery address.
- Checkout through Cashfree.
- Track delivery updates through Shiprocket after purchase.

## Admin Capabilities

- Admin access is based on server-side email authorization.
- Admins can create, edit, upload images for, mark sold, and delete products.
- Products are loaded from MongoDB. There are no hardcoded product seeds.

## API Overview

- `/api/auth` handles signup, login, OTP verification, and session lookup.
- `/api/products` handles public product reads and admin product management.
- `/api/orders` handles reservation, Cashfree payment verification, Shiprocket order creation, serviceability checks, tracking, and order history.
- `/api/user` handles profile updates, saved address, password changes, email changes, and wishlist.

## Important Notes

- Real secrets belong in `.env` and are ignored by git.
- `.env.example` lists required configuration keys.
- Cashfree and Shiprocket calls require production credentials before real checkout and delivery can work.
- The landing page includes a lazy-loaded Three.js scene.
